note: ESM-2 t6 per-position embeddings (2880-dim) BEAT BLOSUM62 on test accuracy (93.3% vs 91.9%) and match on IEDB F1 at threshold 0.99. Key insight: per-position embeddings preserve anchor residue information that mean pooling destroys. ESM-2 at threshold 0.99: Sens 91.8% Spec 91.7% F1 0.865 (vs BLOSUM62: 93.9/93.5/0.860). ESM-2 is more sensitive at low thresholds (46/49 TPs at 0.90) but with more FPs. Larger ESM-2 models (t12/t30) should further improve performance.
